home.subtitle: Experience the next generation of medical care. Consult top doctors, book appointments, and get prescriptions—all from the comfort of your home.
home.card_consultation_text: Connect with specialists via video call instantly anytime, anywhere.
home.card_booking_text: Schedule appointments in seconds. No waiting lines, no hassle.
home.card_prescriptions_text: Digital prescriptions sent directly to your phone or nearest pharmacy.
home.footer_desc: Smart digital healthcare platform to connect you with trusted doctors anytime, anywhere.
home.footer_newsletter_text: Get health tips and product updates directly to your inbox.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Tell us what you need help with – appointments, accounts, or technical issues – and we’ll reply by email as soon as possible.
contact.highlight_support_hours: Support hours: 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM Cairo time
contact.highlight_emergency: For emergencies, contact local emergency services directly.
contact.name: Name
contact.message_placeholder: Write your question or issue in detail...
contact.success_message: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you soon.

login.title: Sign in to Shifaa
login.subtitle: Access your smart, privacy-first health dashboard.
login.error_email_password: Please enter both email and password.
login.error_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.

signup.left_sub: One secure place to manage your health, appointments, and medical records.
signup.point_1: Book and manage appointments in a few taps.
signup.point_2: Securely store and access your medical history.
signup.point_3: Connect with trusted doctors and centers.
signup.manual_title: Or sign up with your email
signup.step1_hint: Start with your basic login information.
signup.step3_hint: Complete your professional details and agreement.
signup.lock_note: Your data is encrypted and stored securely.
signup.patient_note: As a patient, you can track appointments, prescriptions, and secure messages with your doctors.
signup.success_sub: You can now continue to your dashboard and complete your profile.
signup.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup.agree_required: You must agree to Terms & Privacy Policy.

forgot.role_patient: Let’s get you back—quietly and safely.
forgot.role_doctor: We’ll secure your access so you can get back to care.
forgot.role_center: We’ll secure access for your organization.
forgot.sub_typing: Where should we send the access?
forgot.mini_hint: Just type your email and pause for a moment. We’ll handle the rest.
forgot.esc_hint: Press Esc to go back now. We’ll take you back automatically in 0.5 minute.

patient.journey_past_details: Labs were completed successfully. Keep tracking symptoms and follow the care plan.
patient.journey_current_details: Focus on daily habits. If you miss a dose, check your plan or ask the assistant.
patient.journey_next_details: Bring your latest questions. Try to arrive 10 minutes early.

about.main_title: Building a calmer, smarter way to experience healthcare.
about.main_text: Shifaa is a digital layer that connects patients, doctors, and clinics in one organized space. We focus on simple flows, clear communication, and tools that feel natural in everyday care.
about.why_point1_text: One channel for updates, questions, and follow‑ups between patients and doctors.
about.why_point2_text: Appointments, files, and notes stay in sync so no one loses context along the way.
about.why_point3_text: Space for safe AI assistance to support decisions, not replace people.
about.timeline_1_text: Early sketches and interviews with doctors and patients to map the real pain points in daily care.
about.timeline_2_text: Designing the core experience: roles, flows, and how each visit feels inside Shifaa.
about.timeline_3_text: Bringing Shifaa into clinics, measuring what works, and evolving the product with real data.
about.mission_text: to make every medical interaction a bit clearer, calmer, and more connected for both patients and professionals.
about.vision_text: a health system where digital tools and AI quietly support care in the background, so people can focus on being human with each other.
about.quote: “Imagine a visit where your history, questions, and next steps are already in sync when you walk in.”
about.day_sub: Tap a moment to jump, or press Play to watch the story unfold.
about.patient_1_text: Ahmed wakes up to a clean reminder for his follow‑up visit. Time, place, and notes are already organized—no searching, no stress.
about.patient_2_text: On the way, he reviews the last summary and saved questions. Everything appears in one calm flow so he arrives prepared.
about.patient_3_text: At the clinic, his updated info is already available. The visit starts from context, not from zero.
about.patient_4_text: After the visit, Ahmed sees a simple plan: what to do next, what changed, and when to return—written clearly.
about.patient_5_text: A gentle check‑in and actionable reminders arrive later. The day feels connected, not fragmented.
about.doctor_1_text: The doctor opens Shifaa and sees a focused schedule and patient context—who needs what, without noise.
about.doctor_2_text: Before Ahmed arrives, the doctor reviews history, notes, and relevant updates—so the conversation is more meaningful.
about.doctor_3_text: During the visit, the doctor captures notes and decisions in a structured way—no messy paperwork later.
about.doctor_4_text: Next steps are recorded as a clear plan the patient can actually follow, with fewer misunderstandings.
about.doctor_5_text: Follow‑ups and quick clarifications happen in one place, reducing repeated calls and missing details.

admin.activity_sub: Click any row to open the relevant section
admin.patients_sub: Filtered by the global search bar
admin.reports_summary_sub: Quick overview of the current period
admin.modal_approve_note: This will mark all pending appointments as confirmed and activate inactive doctors.

doctor.recent_1: New lab report added for Mona Ali.
doctor.assistant_note: Use this view to get a quick sense of today’s load, then open silent mode or smart prescriptions when you need deeper help.

doctorPatientRecords.title: Patient overview

doctorPatientRecords.actions_description: Start a new prescription or open the smart assistant for this patient.

patientAppointments.subtitle: Upcoming {{upcoming}} · Past {{past}} · Manage your visits in one place.
patientAppointments.followup_desc: Choose a date and time for a follow‑up with {{doctor}}.

patientPrescriptions.title: Patient Medication Hub
patientPrescriptions.no_prescriptions: No prescriptions yet. Ask your doctor to issue one.
patientPrescriptions.refill_desc: Track remaining doses and refill dates per medicine.
patientPrescriptions.pdf_ready: PDF ready for prescription {{id}} ({{date}}). This will later trigger a real file download.
patientPrescriptions.ai_paracetamol: Pain/fever relief. Avoid taking more than the recommended total daily dose.
patientPrescriptions.ai_ors: Oral rehydration salts help replace fluids and electrolytes during diarrhea/vomiting.
patientPrescriptions.ai_default: Use as prescribed. If you feel side effects, contact your doctor/pharmacist.
patientPrescriptions.reminder_panel_desc: Choose how and when you would like to receive reminders for this prescription.
patientPrescriptions.refill_panel_desc: Add a note about when you expect to run out of your medicines or when to refill.
patientPrescriptions.qr_panel_desc: This QR code represents prescription ID {{id}}. In the real system, the pharmacy will scan it to fetch the prescription details.

silentScreen.video_label: Smart Doctor Call · Silent diagnosis mode
silentScreen.gesture_note: Use simple gestures to continue the call when the patient cannot speak.
silentScreen.prompt_pain_location_placeholder: Where is the pain? (e.g. left chest)
silentScreen.breathing_banner: Breathe with me… In… Out… (10 seconds)
silentScreen.observation_sub: Four quick checkpoints · tap once per item
silentScreen.decision_sub: Lock the call with one clear outcome
silentScreen.emergency_hint: High risk · trigger emergency protocol immediately.
silentScreen.summary_no_decision: No final decision selected yet. Tap one of the outcomes above.
silentScreen.summary_decision_safe: Decision: stable enough for remote follow-up with clear safety advice.
silentScreen.summary_decision_exam: Decision: schedule an in-person physical exam as soon as possible.
silentScreen.summary_decision_emergency: Decision: high risk – trigger emergency protocol immediately.

smartRx.assist_suggestion_monitor: Monitor fluid intake over the next 24 hours.
smartRx.qr_text: Scan this code to open this prescription. Pharmacies can verify the ID before dispensing medicines.
smartRx.safety_text: Run safety validation before issuing this prescription.
smartRx.safety_result_ok: ✔ No conflicts found with common allergies or maximum daily dose.

settings.role_settings_sub: Fine‑tune how Shifaa behaves for this profile.
settings.general_unknown_role: Role not recognized. Using generic defaults.
settings.patient_profile_sub: Basic preferences for your patient account
settings.preferred_language_desc: Used for SMS and email notifications.
settings.patient_context_sub: Help Shifaa understand your health background intelligently
settings.patient_context_note: This information is read-only here and comes from your medical record. You can control how Shifaa uses it with doctors.
settings.context_share_allergy_label: Share allergy alerts with any new doctor automatically
settings.context_share_allergy_desc: Force allergy warnings in Smart Prescription, even if the doctor forgets to check history.
settings.patient_privacy_sub: Control what your doctor can see
settings.patient_share_visits_label: Share past visits with new doctors
settings.patient_share_visits_desc: Allow new doctors to view previous encounters inside Shifaa.
settings.patient_share_labs_desc: Attach latest labs to future related appointments.
settings.patient_share_allergy_label: Share allergy alerts with any doctor
settings.patient_share_allergy_desc: Force allergy warnings in Smart Prescription for all doctors.
settings.patient_reminders_sub: How Shifaa keeps you updated as a patient
settings.reminder_timing_desc: How long before an appointment you prefer to be reminded.
settings.quiet_hours_desc: Shifaa avoids sending non‑urgent reminders during these hours.
settings.reminder_rx_updates_desc: Notify when a doctor updates or renews a prescription.
settings.reminder_tips_desc: Occasional product tips and educational content.
settings.recovery_sub: Increase support while you are actively recovering
settings.recovery_desc: When enabled, Shifaa increases reminders, surfaces daily tips, and focuses your dashboard on current treatment.
settings.recovery_benefit_followup: Extra follow‑up reminders during treatment windows.
settings.recovery_benefit_tips: Contextual health tips based on your condition.
settings.recovery_benefit_dashboard: Dashboard highlights your active care plan.
settings.doctor_default_view_desc: Page that opens first when you sign in.
settings.doctor_auto_followup_label: Auto‑generate follow‑up visit after each encounter
settings.doctor_auto_followup_desc: Create a suggested follow‑up X days after every completed visit.
settings.doctor_attach_labs_label: Attach last labs automatically in prescriptions
settings.doctor_attach_labs_desc: Include the most recent related labs with new prescriptions.
settings.doctor_templates_desc: Start with pre‑filled diagnosis + plan for frequent conditions.
settings.doctor_notifications_sub: Signals that reach you as a doctor
settings.doctor_new_booking_desc: When patients book or reschedule appointments.
settings.doctor_lab_results_desc: When new lab results arrive for your patients.
settings.doctor_risk_sub: How strict Shifaa should be with clinical warnings
settings.doctor_risk_mode_desc: Controls how many checks and warnings are shown.
settings.doctor_risk_note: Conservative mode adds more allergy, interaction and dose checks. Fast mode reduces interruptions in high‑volume scenarios.
settings.doctor_allergy_check_desc: Warn if prescribed medicine conflicts with recorded allergies.
settings.doctor_high_risk_desc: Require an extra confirmation for critical drugs.
settings.doctor_ai_sub: How much help you want from Smart Prescription
settings.doctor_ai_default_desc: Choose how Smart Prescription participates in your work.
settings.doctor_ai_note: You can override this per‑patient during the prescription flow.
settings.doctor_max_patients_desc: Get notified when your schedule crosses a safe threshold.
settings.doctor_breaks_desc: Gentle prompts to take a short break between long sessions.
settings.doctor_late_hours_desc: Highlight days where you are consistently working late.
settings.admin_risk_sub: Quick snapshot of how the system is behaving
settings.admin_risk_graph_placeholder: Mini risk graph placeholder – can be wired to real metrics later.
settings.admin_audit_sub: Monitoring and safety for the command center
settings.admin_log_logins_desc: Keep audit history of successful and failed logins.
settings.admin_unusual_load_desc: Send alerts when risk index stays high for too long.
settings.admin_roles_sub: Design and reuse role templates across your organization
settings.admin_roles_intro: Create named role blueprints and reuse them for new clinics or sites.
settings.admin_access_sub: High‑level control for roles inside Shifaa
settings.admin_export_reports_desc: Enable CSV export for their own patients and schedule.
settings.admin_reception_edit_desc: Reception can move or cancel appointments for all doctors.
settings.admin_bulk_approval_desc: Extra confirmation for actions like ‘Approve all’.
settings.admin_compliance_sub: Enforce clinical rules across the platform
settings.admin_narcotics_desc: Require a second approver for controlled substances.
settings.admin_mandatory_allergy_desc: Block issuing a prescription until allergies are confirmed.
settings.admin_highrisk_doc_desc: Require a brief note before finalizing certain medications.
settings.admin_simulation_sub: Test how Shifaa behaves under stress before it happens
settings.admin_simulation_text: Run a safe simulation of emergency load to see how response time, alerts and queues behave without affecting real data.
settings.admin_simulation_after: After simulation, a short report will summarize system performance and bottlenecks.
